title: Transfinite
description: this mod adds a few QoL machines for AvaritiaNEO and Mekanism
body:
While playing mods like **Mekanism** or **Avaritia**, have you ever wanted to get rid of a bunch of multiblocks and speed up the production of some resources? If so, I have a solution! Let me present you a mod that will simplify your life and save you time.

This mod is very useful in big modpacks

# Features
Currently, the mod adds **2** blocks for resource generation

- **Neutron Combiner** - a block that can hold up to 64 **Neutron Collectors**(avaritia) in a single slot. It also reduces the production time of Neutronium piles to 1 minute.
  
- **Antimatter Generator** - a block that generates 1 **Pellet of Antimatter**(mekanism) per 100 mFE
